title: Foreign resident capital gains withholding
description: Find out about the foreign resident capital gains withholding (FRCGW), including who it applies to and when it applies.

child_links.title: Foreign resident capital gains withholding overview
child_links.description: Find out what foreign resident capital gains withholding (FRCGW) is and how it applies when disposing of property.

child_links.title: Australian residents and clearance certificates
child_links.description: Australians selling property need a clearance certificate to avoid having an amount withheld from the sale price.

child_links.title: Foreign residents and variations
child_links.description: Foreign residents are subject to FRCGW when selling Australian real property.

child_links.title: Vendor declarations
child_links.description: Find out when providing a vendor declaration results in a purchase not being subject to FRCGW.

child_links.title: Paying the foreign resident capital gains withholding
child_links.description: Find out how to pay the withholding amount when foreign resident capital gains withholding (FRCGW) applies.

child_links.title: Compulsory acquisition of property by government authorities
child_links.description: Certain Australian Government authorities can use legislation for the compulsory acquisition of property.
